title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Confucius Institute

Announcements

Confucius Institute Scholarship

25
						February

2019

Notice on the Application of 2019 Hanban Scholarship

Please make sure to read the Application Guide for Confucius
Institute Scholarship 2019 at Beijing Language and Culture University clearly
and then prepare materials accordingly.

Date of receiving application materials: 1th, Mar to 10th May. The sooner the better.

Priority to accept consultation by WeChat group. The code of WeChat group is under this notice.

Telephone consultation time: Every Tuesday or Wednesday, 13:00 - 15:00.

Mailbox to accept application meterials:

906743791@qq.com

Application materials including:

Passport photo page scan version

HSK/HSKK report scan version (The reports should be in two - year validity period)

Highest education certificate and academic transcript at school.

Basic information should be with the material, including:

Turkish name and surname

Chinese name and surname(if have)

Date of birth

Application category(one year or four years or other type)

Mailbox and telephone number

We will reply you after checking your materials and basic information.

Click for Chinese detailed info.

Click for English detailed info.
